modeReason: Roadmap triage agent confirms normal mode. v2.8.4 is the current release. DeepAgents adapter shipped (v2.8.1). Heredoc false-positive fixed (v2.8.4). Graceful SQLite fallback added (v2.8.3). KE-2 (#917) remains the critical path to v3.0. P1 policy gap: github.pr.* action types missing from default allow-list (#1177) — PR #1178 partially addresses (Copilot meta-tools); full github.* policy fix still needed. Security issue count stable at 2 (#640, #639). Risk profile slightly elevated due to #1177.

prBlastRadius.note: PR #1178 (valid fix: Copilot meta-tools), PR #1151/#1150 (EM reports, merge conflicts). Small blast radius.

testFailureRate.note: 4364 tests passing on main. All 18 packages green.

governanceDenialRate.note: 5 HIGH-priority issues open. #618 RESOLVED. CRITICAL policy gap #1177: github.pr.* actions missing from default policy; blocks pr-merger agent entirely. PR #1178 partially addresses (Copilot meta-tools).

mergeConflictRate.note: PRs #1150/#1151 have merge conflicts; they are EM report docs, low blast radius. PR #1178 is clean.

deltaFromPrior.cause: New P1 policy gap discovered (#1177): github.pr.* actions missing from default allow-list, blocking pr-merger skill entirely. 2 EM reports with merge conflicts in PR queue. Overall health still NORMAL.

completedPhases.name: Reference Monitor Hardening
completedPhases.note: All 7 roadmap items complete. Default-deny shipped 2026-03-24. PAUSE/ROLLBACK enforced 2026-03-18. Performance benchmark gate operational. Commit scope guard (#22) shipped v2.5.0.

completedPhases.name: Studio Runtime
completedPhases.note: All 3 items shipped ahead of schedule in v2.7.x (PR #987): agentguard init studio wizard, execution profiles (6 total), swarm template schema with zero-dep runtime validator.

activePhases.name: Kernel Evolution Sprint

KE-2.note: ActionContext design — in-progress, priority:high, last updated 2026-03-25

activePhases.note: KE-1 and KE-3 complete. KE-2 is the critical path for v3.0. KE-4 in review. Sprint at 37%. Go fast-path delegation shipped (PRs #1000, #1001) as precursor to full Go kernel.

activePhases.name: v3.0 Major Release
activePhases.blockedBy: KE-2 (ActionContext) must ship before v3.0 item 1 can be checked

activePhases.name: Go Kernel Rewrite (Phase 1)

shippedItems.item: Go binary fast-path delegation in claude-hook

activePhases.note: Fast-path delegation operational. Full architecture end-to-end validation still pending.

plannedPhases.name: Pull-Based Runner
plannedPhases.note: Depends on v3.0 release + Cloud Phase 2A

milestones.name: Reference Monitor Hardening
milestones.significance: Phase 6 completion transforms AgentGuard from advisory interception to mandatory execution control. Default-deny is now the baseline. This unlocks KE-2 and v3.0 work.

milestones.name: Governance Event Envelope
milestones.significance: All telemetry now follows versioned schema. Cloud ingestion consumes envelopes directly with zero special cases.

milestones.name: Studio Runtime
milestones.significance: Studio wizard, execution profiles, and swarm template schema shipped ahead of schedule in v2.7.x (PR #987). Removes this dependency from v3.1 timeline. Runner is now the sole v3.1 item.
Added Codex CLI and Gemini CLI adapters. AgentGuard now governs 4 CLI agents: Claude Code, Copilot CLI, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI.

v2.8.1-v2.8.4 patch series: DeepAgents framework adapter (v2.8.1), driverType telemetry field (v2.8.1), read-only fail-open fix (v2.8.2), CI stability fixes (v2.8.3), heredoc false-positive fix + claude-init idempotent hooks (v2.8.4). AgentGuard now governs 5 CLI agents: Claude Code, Copilot CLI, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, DeepAgents.

backlogExpansionRate.note: 186 open issues total. Key new issues since v2.8.0: #1177 (P1: github.pr.* policy gap — CRITICAL, blocks pr-merger skill), #1176/#1172/#1167/#1165/#1159 (dogfood denials — systemic policy config issue), #1173/#1174/#1175 (Phase 8 policy ecosystem items from backlog-steward). #1128 (swarm health: 149 orphaned branches, needs human prune). KE-2 (#917) remains the highest-priority unstarted engineering item.

warningPhases.note: KE-2 (ActionContext, #917) status:pending with 0/4 checkboxes. No assigned PR. Critical path for v3.0. Has been unstarted since 2026-03-25. Escalate to kernel-sr.

stallDetection.note: No phases exceed the 14-day stall threshold. KE-2 is the primary risk — v3.0 cannot ship without it.

prQueue.note: PR #1178 (valid Copilot meta-tools fix, awaiting review). PRs #1150/#1151 are EM report PRs with merge conflicts — should be rebased or superseded.

ciOnMain.note: Main branch CI green at HEAD fd820ac. 4364 tests passing.

agentLiveness.note: Multiple agent branches active. Swarm producing work as of 2026-03-28.

mergeConflicts.note: PRs #1150/#1151 have merge conflicts. Low urgency (EM reports); authors should rebase or close stale PRs.

roadmapProgress.note: v2.8.4 released (5 CLI agent adapters). Critical path: KE-2 (#917) → v3.0. DeepAgents adapter Phase 9 item checked.

All 6 health dimensions green. Mode confirmed: normal. No remediation required.

Issue #1048 closed (shipped via PR #991).

ROADMAP.md and swarm-state.json updated: v2.8.4 current release. New entries: DeepAgents adapter (v2.8.1), driverType telemetry (v2.8.1), SQLite fallback (v2.8.3), heredoc fix (v2.8.4). Phase 9 DeepAgents checked. P1 policy gap #1177 (github.pr.* missing from allow-list) flagged as high-priority blocker. Security bypass count 6→5 (#618 resolved via PR #1032). Risk score 8→14 (NORMAL).

blockers.description: KE-2 (ActionContext, #917) is the critical path blocker for v3.0. Status: pending, unstarted. No assigned PR.
blockers.recommendation: Assign to kernel-sr or architect-agent. Single most important engineering work item.

blockers.description: P1: github.pr.* and github.issue.* action types missing from default agentguard.yaml allow-list. Blocks pr-merger and any skill using `gh` CLI entirely. Also github-mcp-server not in MCP allow-list. PR #1178 addresses Copilot meta-tools but not the github.* gap.
blockers.recommendation: Assign coder-agent to add github.pr.*/github.issue.*/github.run.*/github.api allow rules to agentguard.yaml and all policy packs.

blockers.description: 2 security issues without assigned PRs: #640 (path manipulation), #639 (credential stripping). #618 RESOLVED via PR #1032.
blockers.recommendation: Assign implementation agent to #640 (path manipulation — most exploitable).

blockers.description: 149 orphaned branches reported by stale-branch-janitor (#1128). Swarm health alert open since 2026-03-27.
blockers.recommendation: Human should run `git worktree prune` + bulk delete orphaned branches via stale-branch-janitor PR.

systemSummary.progressSinceLastRun: v2.8.1-v2.8.4 patch series merged: DeepAgents adapter, driverType telemetry, graceful SQLite fallback, CI stability, heredoc false-positive fix, claude-init idempotent hooks. ROADMAP Phase 9 DeepAgents item checked. Security issue count 6→5 (#618 resolved). P1 policy gap discovered: github.pr.* missing from allow-list (#1177). Risk score 8→14.

modeChangeConditions.toNormal: CURRENT STATE — risk score 14, 3 open PRs (2 conflicted docs), main CI green.
modeChangeConditions.toElevated: Risk score exceeds 20, or PR queue grows above 5, or new critical security regression, or #1177 policy gap causes major agent outage.
modeChangeConditions.toCritical: Main CI failure rate >30%, 2+ unresolved critical issues, or merge conflict cascade (3+ PRs).
